title: TK-717
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:TK717-Empire13.jpg]] |name=TK-717 |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|''Death Star I'']] in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|So, Ralltiir. Was it as bad as they say?''"
"''Worse. I'm not sure if it can be saved.|TK-717 and [[TK-622]]|[[Empire 13|''Empire'' 13]]}} '''TK-717''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] stationed aboard an Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] headed for the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] shortly before of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. Before reaching the battle station, TK-717 and [[TK-622]] discussed the planet [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]] and its Rebel extremists. He was one of the many victims who perished in the destruction of the Death Star by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. ==Appearances== *[[Empire 13|''Empire'' 13]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=TK-717 |es=TK-717 |nl=TK-717 |pl=TK-717 }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Stormtroopers of the Galactic Empire]]
